allow: Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); console.log\('ZodError:', typeof z.ZodError\); console.log\('ZodIssueCode:', z.ZodIssueCode\); console.log\('z.uuid:', typeof z.uuid\); console.log\('z.url:', typeof z.url\); console.log\('z.email:', typeof z.email\); console.log\('z.string\(\).uuid:', typeof z.string\(\).uuid\); console.log\('z.string\(\).url:', typeof z.string\(\).url\); console.log\('z.string\(\).email:', typeof z.string\(\).email\);")

Bash(node -e "const z = require\('zod'\); console.log\('version:', z.version || 'unknown'\); console.log\('ZodError:', typeof z.ZodError\); console.log\('ZodIssueCode:', JSON.stringify\(z.ZodIssueCode\)\); console.log\('z.uuid:', typeof z.uuid\); console.log\('z.url:', typeof z.url\); console.log\('z.string\(\).uuid:', typeof z.string\(\).uuid\);")
